root_text.an10.66:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ āyasmā sāriputto magadhesu viharati nālakagāmake.
root_text.an10.66:1.2: Atha kho sāmaṇḍakāni paribbājako yenāyasmā sāriputto tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmatā sāriputtena saddhiṁ sammodi.
root_text.an10.66:1.3: Sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho sāmaṇḍakāni paribbājako āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an10.66:2.1: “Kiṁ nu kho, āvuso, sāriputta, imasmiṁ dhammavinaye sukhaṁ, kiṁ dukkhan”ti?
root_text.an10.66:2.2: “Anabhirati kho, āvuso, imasmiṁ dhammavinaye dukkhā, abhirati sukhā.
root_text.an10.66:2.3: Anabhiratiyā, āvuso, sati idaṁ dukkhaṁ pāṭikaṅkhaṁ—
root_text.an10.66:2.14: Anabhiratiyā, āvuso, sati idaṁ dukkhaṁ pāṭikaṅkhaṁ.
root_text.an10.66:3.1: Abhiratiyā, āvuso, sati idaṁ sukhaṁ pāṭikaṅkhaṁ—
root_text.an10.66:3.12: Abhiratiyā, āvuso, sati idaṁ sukhaṁ pāṭikaṅkhan”ti.

translation_text.an10.66:1.1: At one time Venerable Sāriputta was staying in the land of the Magadhans near the little village of Nālaka.
translation_text.an10.66:1.2: Then the wanderer Sāmaṇḍakāni went up to Venerable Sāriputta and exchanged greetings with him.
translation_text.an10.66:1.3: When the greetings and polite conversation were over, Sāmaṇḍakāni sat down to one side and said to Sāriputta:
translation_text.an10.66:2.1: “Reverend Sāriputta, in this teaching and training, what is happiness and what is suffering?”
translation_text.an10.66:2.2: “Reverend, in this teaching and training dissatisfaction is suffering and satisfaction is happiness.
translation_text.an10.66:2.3: When you’re dissatisfied, you can expect this kind of suffering.
translation_text.an10.66:2.4: You find no happiness or pleasure while walking …
translation_text.an10.66:2.10: at the root of a tree …
translation_text.an10.66:2.14: When you’re dissatisfied, this is the kind of suffering you can expect.
translation_text.an10.66:3.1: When you’re satisfied, you can expect this kind of happiness.
translation_text.an10.66:3.2: You find happiness or pleasure while walking …
translation_text.an10.66:3.8: at the root of a tree …
translation_text.an10.66:3.12: When you’re satisfied, this is the kind of happiness you can expect.”
